target.description: q17 residual window-relaxed fallback endpoint-menu selector

squareCheck.interpretation: No full-menu covered endpoint was selected in this profile; inspect candidate square-divisor statuses and window availability.

endpointRule.statement: For each menu prime p, choose k_p(left) modulo p^2 so p^2 divides outsider*(left - 14 - 25*k_p(left)) + 1, then set right_p(left)=left-14-25*k_p(left).
endpointRule.invariant: Every compiled endpoint has right congruent to 18 mod 25 and is outsider-compatible by construction.

nextTheoremOptions.statement: The primary menu misses at left=34414907; inspect this miss before adding more abstraction.
